title: variables_enabled rescanned per eval call
description: eval_script() (evaluator.rs:75-86) linearly scans the entire Script for require ["variables"] on every call to evaluate(). This is O(script_size) work per message evaluated. For a server processing thousands of messages per second through the same compiled script, this is pure waste. variables_enabled should be computed once in compile() and stored in CompiledScript alongside the regex_cache.
